title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 7
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 7}} {{ComicBook |reprint=1 |image=[[File:CSWTEA7-LEC.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 7 |writer=[[Russ Manning]] |penciller=[[Russ Manning]], [[Brian Snoddy]], and [[Rick Hoberg]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Ray Murtaugh]] |cover artist=[[Mischa McDowell]] and [[Rick Hoberg]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[February 14]], [[1995]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53786/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_7|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #7}} |pages= |upc= |timeline=[[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] |series=''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' |issue=7 }} '''''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 7''' was the seventh issue of the ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]'' series. This particular ''Classic'' series were reformatted and colored reprints of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars (comic strip)|daily newspaper strip]] by [[Russ Manning]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''While delivering a cache of pre-Empire textbooks to an outlying system, Luke Skywalker encounters Imperial forces as they take an entire school hostage! A young prodigy escapes, and he alone can offer the rallying cry that could save the children...and the Rebel Alliance as well!'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures Book 7
BRING ME THE CHILDREN |text=During a delivery, Luke Skywalker encounters the minions of Darth Vader and discovers a plan to capture Rebels...using children as bait. A child prodigy escapes from the Imperial forces, and his scheme may be all that stands between the Empire and certain doom for the Rebel Alliance...}} ==Contents== *"[[Bring Me the Children]]" ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 7}} ===Cover gallery=== File:ClassicStarWarsEarlyAdventures7CC.jpg|Dark Horse cover File:CSWTEA7-LEC.png|Legends Epic Collection cover ===Collected in=== *[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' trade paperback]] *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Newspaper Strips Vol. 1]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53786/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_7|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #7}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები: ადრეული თავგადასავლები 7 |nl=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 7 }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures issues|07|Early Adventures 07]]
